test.create_query: CREATE TABLE lift_perf_orders (k UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY k SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192
CREATE TABLE lift_perf_lineitem (k UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY k SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO lift_perf_orders SELECT number FROM numbers(200000000) SETTINGS max_insert_threads = 8
INSERT INTO lift_perf_lineitem SELECT number FROM numbers(200000000) SETTINGS max_insert_threads = 8
test.query: SELECT count() FROM (SELECT * FROM lift_perf_orders WHERE k = 100000000) AS o INNER JOIN lift_perf_lineitem AS l ON o.k = l.k SETTINGS query_plan_lift_predicate_across_join = 1
SELECT count() FROM (SELECT * FROM lift_perf_orders WHERE k = 100000000) AS o INNER JOIN lift_perf_lineitem AS l ON o.k = l.k SETTINGS query_plan_lift_predicate_across_join = 0
SELECT count() FROM (SELECT * FROM lift_perf_orders WHERE k BETWEEN 100000000 AND 100001000) AS o INNER JOIN lift_perf_lineitem AS l ON o.k = l.k SETTINGS query_plan_lift_predicate_across_join = 1
SELECT count() FROM (SELECT * FROM lift_perf_orders WHERE k BETWEEN 100000000 AND 100001000) AS o INNER JOIN lift_perf_lineitem AS l ON o.k = l.k SETTINGS query_plan_lift_predicate_across_join = 0
SELECT sum(l.k) FROM (SELECT * FROM lift_perf_orders WHERE k BETWEEN 50000000 AND 50010000) AS o LEFT JOIN lift_perf_lineitem AS l ON o.k = l.k SETTINGS query_plan_lift_predicate_across_join = 1
SELECT sum(l.k) FROM (SELECT * FROM lift_perf_orders WHERE k BETWEEN 50000000 AND 50010000) AS o LEFT JOIN lift_perf_lineitem AS l ON o.k = l.k SETTINGS query_plan_lift_predicate_across_join = 0

SELECT count() FROM (SELECT * FROM lift_perf_orders WHERE k IN (10, 1000000, 50000000, 100000000, 150000000, 199999999)) AS o INNER JOIN lift_perf_lineitem AS l ON o.k = l.k SETTINGS query_plan_lift_predicate_across_join = 1

SELECT count() FROM (SELECT * FROM lift_perf_orders WHERE k IN (10, 1000000, 50000000, 100000000, 150000000, 199999999)) AS o INNER JOIN lift_perf_lineitem AS l ON o.k = l.k SETTINGS query_plan_lift_predicate_across_join = 0
SELECT count() FROM (SELECT * FROM lift_perf_orders WHERE k BETWEEN 1 AND 20000000) AS o INNER JOIN lift_perf_lineitem AS l ON o.k = l.k SETTINGS query_plan_lift_predicate_across_join = 1
SELECT count() FROM (SELECT * FROM lift_perf_orders WHERE k BETWEEN 1 AND 20000000) AS o INNER JOIN lift_perf_lineitem AS l ON o.k = l.k SETTINGS query_plan_lift_predicate_across_join = 0
SELECT count() FROM lift_perf_orders AS o INNER JOIN lift_perf_lineitem AS l ON o.k = l.k WHERE l.k % 1000 = 0 SETTINGS query_plan_lift_predicate_across_join = 1
SELECT count() FROM lift_perf_orders AS o INNER JOIN lift_perf_lineitem AS l ON o.k = l.k WHERE l.k % 1000 = 0 SETTINGS query_plan_lift_predicate_across_join = 0
